_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-720001: Approved install script from vendor documentation
scenario: Development team uses official Homebrew/NVM install script via curl|bash as documented by the vendor
why_fp: Source URL is the official NVM GitHub repository (raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm)
Version-pinned URL (v0.39.7) — not a floating 'latest' pointer
Branch is 'develop', not 'main' — does not deploy to production
Script is widely used and auditable open-source tooling
tuning_recommendation: Allowlist approved curl|bash sources: raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh, get.docker.com, sh.rustup.rs
Add version-pinning requirement: URL must contain a version tag (v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+)
Apply stricter alerting only on main/release branches (production deployments)
